episodes.title: Hannah Murray's Wellness Cult Breakdown
episodes.description:
Hannah Murray, Game of Thrones star, reveals she suffered a psychotic breakdown after joining a wellness cult—warning it could happen to anyone. During a London retreat, she spiraled into paranoia, believing she could heal others by reading neck diagrams. Admitted to a mental health facility, she was diagnosed with bipolar disorder—a revelation that brought clarity. Now she avoids all wellness trends, fearing even meditation or crystals could trigger her trauma. Her story exposes the seductive danger of quick-fix self-help and underscores the need for critical thinking when chasing “perfect” solutions.
